actionUnits.condition: PrefabInstance 1071784861 ('Teleport Anchor') under parent 'Teleport Area Setup' (fileID 1565887663878291440). MonoBehaviour fileID 3953368309659336407 is AnchorVisuals (script guid b2dd7fabdb14fca498bd9e0def11ab19). Scene meta matches script fields: m_FadeAnimation, m_Arrow, m_TargetArrowHeight=1, m_ArrowAnimationDuration=0.375, m_AnimationCurve modified via PrefabInstance. Trigger OnAnchorEnter to play fade/raise arrow; after 0.5s trigger HideArrowOnTeleport (simulate teleport) and OnAnchorExit (play reverse fade/lower arrow).
